pull_request.title: Add planner issue idempotency markers
pull_request.summary: Adds deterministic planner issue idempotency keys and renders them as low-noise HTML comments in planner-created GitHub issue bodies.
scope: Added SHA-256 based planner issue idempotency key generation from issue content and plan index
Rendered marker-aware planner issue bodies for dry-run output and live GitHub issue creation
Covered key stability, content-sensitive key changes, per-index differences, and marker inclusion with focused tests
